## Checklist Before Requesting a Review

- [ ] The proposed changes are covered by thorough tests (`uv run --group test pytest`).
- [ ] Linting passes (`uv run --group lint ruff check`).
- [ ] Formatting passes (`uv run --group lint ruff format --check`).
- [ ] Type checking passes (`uv run --group lint ty check`).
